name: hs_all_accessible_team_ids
label: All teams
description: The team IDs, including the team hierarchy, of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_assigned_business_unit_ids
label: Brands
description: The brands this record is assigned to.

name: hs_all_owner_ids
label: All owner IDs
description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_team_ids
label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_allowed_checkout_fee_ids
label: Allowed checkout fee IDs
description: Stores up to two ids for the checkout fees that can be applied to the subscription at checkout

name: hs_allowed_payment_methods
label: Allowed payment methods
description: The payment methods that can be used to pay the invoice

name: hs_arr
label: Annual recurring revenue
description: The annual recurring revenue from the subscription.

name: hs_arr_in_company_currency
label: Annual recurring revenue in company currency
description: The annual recurring revenue from the subscription, in your company's currency

name: hs_automated_taxes_enabled
label: Automated sales taxes enabled
description: Whether or not automated sales taxes is enabled for subscription

name: hs_automatically_email_invoices
label: Automatically email invoices
description: Determines if recurring invoices are automatically emailed to the customer on each billing date

name: hs_churn_date
label: Churn date
description: Indicates when the subscription status has changed to INACTIVE or UNPAID.

name: hs_collect_address_types
label: Address types to collect
description: The types of addresses that are collected while paying the invoice.

name: hs_collection_process
label: Collection process
description: Describes the payment collection process for the subscription i.e. automatic vs manual (not yet supported)

name: hs_contact_email
label: Contact email
description: The email address of the contact associated to the subscription. This is the primary email address used for subscription related emails.

name: hs_contract_managed
label: contract_managed
description: Indicates whether or not a subscription is managed by a billing-enabled contract.

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: Object create date/time
description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_currency_code
label: Currency code
description: The currency code of the subscription.

name: hs_current_arr
label: Current ARR
description: Sum of ARR from currently active subscription line items

name: hs_current_mrr
label: Current MRR
description: Sum of MRR from currently active subscription line items

name: hs_ending_arr
label: Ending ARR
description: ARR at subscription end, set from the last line item segment

name: hs_ending_mrr
label: Ending MRR
description: MRR at subscription end date

name: hs_entry_arr
label: Entry ARR
description: ARR at subscription start, set from the first line item segment

name: hs_entry_mrr
label: Entry MRR
description: MRR at subscription start

name: hs_internal_subscription_id
label: Subscription ID
description: The internal reference id for a subscription. This is separate from the CRM object id for a subscription.

name: hs_invoice_comments
label: Invoice Comments
description: Comments to the invoice recipient

name: hs_invoice_creation
label: Invoice Creation
description: An indicator of whether a subscription is invoiced through HubSpot's Commerce Hub.

name: hs_is_status_active
label: Status is active
description: The calculated property value is 1 when the Subscription status is active or 0 otherwise.

name: hs_language
label: Language
description: Language of the invoice

name: hs_last_modification_reason
label: Last modification reason
description: Reason for last subscription edit

name: hs_last_modified_at
label: Subscription modified on
description: The timestamp in epoch milliseconds for when a subscription was last modified.

name: hs_last_modified_by
label: Last modified by
description: The id of the user who last modified the subscription

name: hs_last_payment_amount
label: Last payment amount
description: The amount that was charged for the subscription during the most recent billing period.

name: hs_last_payment_date
label: Last Payment Date
description: When the last payment processed for the subscription

name: hs_last_payment_status
label: Status of last payment
description: The status of the most recently initiated payment

name: hs_lastmodifieddate
label: Object last modified date/time
description: Most recent timestamp of any property update for this object. This includes HubSpot internal properties, which can be visible or hidden. This property is updated automatically.

name: hs_locale
label: Locale
description: Locale of the invoice

name: hs_merged_object_ids
label: Merged record IDs
description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_mrr
label: Monthly recurring revenue
description: The monthly recurring revenue from the subscription.

name: hs_mrr_in_company_currency
label: Monthly recurring revenue in company currency
description: The monthly recurring revenue from the subscription, in your company's currency

name: hs_name
label: Name
description: The name of the subscription.

name: hs_net_payment_terms
label: Net Payment Terms
description: Refers to the period, expressed in days (e.g., Net 30), within which subscription invoices must be paid

name: hs_next_payment_amount
label: Next payment amount
description: The value to be processed on next payment date. If next payment date is null, the property is set to empty.

name: hs_next_payment_due_date
label: Next billing date
description: The next billing date where the subscription will be invoiced. If the collection method value is automatic_payments, the subscription will be automatically charged. If the collection method value is manual_payments, an invoice will be created.

name: hs_number_of_completed_payments
label: Number of completed payments
description: The number of payments that have been successfully processed for the subscription.

name: hs_number_of_expected_payments
label: Number of expected payments
description: The number of total payments expected for the subscription.

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source
label: Record creation source
description: Raw internal PropertySource present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_1
label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_2
label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_3
label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_id
label: Record creation source ID
description: Raw internal sourceId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_user_id
label: Record creation source user ID
description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_original_buyer_email_address
label: Original buyer email address
description: The email address of the original buyer of the subscription

name: hs_overdue_invoice_count
label: Overdue invoice count
description: Count of associated invoices that are overdue

name: hs_owning_teams
label: Owning Teams
description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

name: hs_paid_invoice_count
label: Paid invoice count
description: Count of associated invoices that are paid

name: hs_payment_enabled
label: Payment Enabled
description: Indicates if a checkout link is included on invoices from subscriptions with a manual collection method

name: hs_payment_method
label: Payment method
description: The payment method on file for this subscription.

name: hs_payment_method_source_at_creation
label: Payment method source at creation
description: Indicates where a payment method is collected when creating a subscription

name: hs_payments_source_app_id
label: Payment source
description: The object or tool that created the subscription.

name: hs_payments_source_id
label: Payment source ID
description: The unique ID for the object or tool that created the the subscription. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_pinned_engagement_id
label: Pinned engagement ID
description: The object ID of the current pinned engagement. This will only be shown in the app if there is already an association to the engagement.

name: hs_processor_type
label: Processor
description: The processor for collecting subscription payments.

name: hs_read_only
label: Read only object
description: Determines whether a record can be edited by a user.

name: hs_recipient_billing_address_source
label: Recipient billing address source
description: Whether to use the recipient address on Company or Subscription object when making new Invoices

name: hs_recipient_company_address
label: Recipient company street address
description: The address of the recipient's company or organization.

name: hs_recipient_company_address2
label: Recipient company street address 2
description: Additional address of the recipient's company or organization.

name: hs_recipient_company_city
label: Recipient company city
description: The city of the recipient's company or organization.

name: hs_recipient_company_country
label: Recipient company country
description: The country of the recipient's company or organization.

name: hs_recipient_company_state
label: Recipient company state/region
description: The state or region of the recipient's company or organization.

name: hs_recipient_company_zip
label: Recipient company postal code
description: The postal or zip code of the recipient's company or organization.

name: hs_recurring_billing_end_date
label: End date
description: The date the subscription will end.

name: hs_recurring_billing_frequency
label: Recurring billing frequency
description: How often the customer is billed for the subscription.

name: hs_recurring_billing_start_date
label: Start date
description: The date the subscription is scheduled to start (which is the day of the first payment).

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_shared_user_ids
label: Shared users
description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

name: hs_status
label: Status
description: The status of the subscription.

name: hs_store_payment_method_at_checkout
label: Store payment method at checkout
description: Allow customers to store their payment method at checkout.

name: hs_tax_ids
label: Tax ID
description: The account tax IDs listed on the generated invoice. The tax ID includes a tax ID type and a tax ID number. Valid tax ids are managed in invoice settings.

name: hs_total_arr
label: Total ARR (Internal)
description: Sum of ARR from all associated subscription line items

name: hs_total_collected_amount
label: Total collected amount
description: The total amount collected from the subscription. The amount is in the currency of the subscription.

name: hs_total_mrr
label: Total MRR (Internal)
description: Sum of MRR from all associated subscription line items

name: hs_total_remaining_amount
label: Total Remaining Amount
description: The total amount remaining to be collected for subscriptions with a fixed number of payments. The amount is in the currency of the subscription.

name: hs_unique_creation_key
label: Unique creation key
description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

name: hs_update_payment_method_link
label: Update payment method link
description: Link to update payment method on this subscription

name: hs_updated_by_user_id
label: Updated by user ID
description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
label: User IDs of all notification followers
description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers
description: The user IDs of all object owners that have clicked unfollow within the object to opt-out of getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_owners
label: User IDs of all owners
description: The user IDs of all owners of this record.

name: hs_was_imported
label: Performed in an import
description: Object is part of an import

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Subscription owner
description: The owner of the subscription.

name: hubspot_team_id
label: Owner's main team
description: The main team of the record owner. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.
